design_philosophy.theme_strategy: Light Mode Default (for data density) with Dark Mode toggle

usage_rules.ag_grid_header: bg-slate-50 text-slate-500 uppercase text-[11px] font-bold tracking-wider

data_tables.container_class: h-[calc(100vh-200px)] w-full rounded-md border shadow-sm overflow-hidden

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-white hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 rounded-md px-3 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 hover:bg-red-700 text-white rounded-md px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple typographic logo 'Bank2Tally' in Chivo Black font

ag_grid_styling.custom_css: .ag-theme-alpine { --ag-font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; --ag-font-size: 13px; --ag-header-background-color: #f8fafc; --ag-header-foreground-color: #64748b; --ag-border-color: #e2e8f0; --ag-row-hover-color: #f1f5f9; --ag-selected-row-background-color: #eff6ff; --ag-row-border-color: #f1f5f9; } .ag-header-cell-label { font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; font-size: 11px; }

cell_renderers.status: Badge component (Green for Reconciled, Yellow for Review)
cell_renderers.amount: Right aligned, monospace font, red for debit, green for credit

accessibility.keyboard_nav: Full keyboard support for grid navigation and form inputs

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Shadcn UI with the 'slate' base color.
2. Install 'ag-grid-react' and 'ag-grid-community' for the transaction table.
3. Use 'recharts' for the dashboard summary charts (Bar chart for monthly volume, Pie chart for category split).
4. Implement the 'Upload' page with a drag-and-drop zone using 'react-dropzone'.
5. For the 'Mapping Rules' page, create a condition builder UI.
6. Ensure the 'Transaction Table' allows inline editing for the 'Ledger' column.
7. Use the defined image URLs for the auth pages.
8. Apply the 'Chivo' font to all headings and 'JetBrains Mono' to financial data.
9. Create a 'Layout' component that includes the Sidebar and Topbar.
10. Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'File uploaded successfully', 'Export complete').
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for the main background; keep it clean Slate-50.
Ensure all forms have client-side validation using Zod.
For the 'AI Narration' feature, add a visual indicator (e.g., a small purple dot or icon) next to the narration text to show it was AI-processed.
The 'Export' button should be prominent (Primary Action) on the Transaction page.
Support 'Dark Mode' by using Tailwind's 'dark:' modifier (e.g., dark:bg-slate-950 dark:border-slate-800).
